notes: Added deterministic repo-local actions for screenshot capture, changed-file linting, and validate-plus-route.
Extended the supervisor protocol with revision tracking and a refine command that reopens downstream phases by clearing affected artifacts.
Made design review evidence and design visual constraints explicit schema requirements and updated agent/docs guidance to match.
open_issues: Historical design-review artifacts created before preview_evidence was required are not automatically backfilled.
The new shell wrappers assume git and agent-browser are available in the local environment.
